title: tabernaemontana odoratissima
intro: Tabernaemontana odoratissima, also known as the fragrant tree or sweet olive, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, containing compounds such as alkaloids and terpenoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana odoratissima include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties, making it a valuable resource for herbal remedies. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's leaves, bark, and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
